flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Wayland Baptist University fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (13.6% → 9.3%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Wayland Baptist University rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.7k → $7.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Wayland Baptist University fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (25.1% → 19.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Wayland Baptist University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.1k vs 2.7k).
